# Simone Traversi

> Robotics Software Engineer & Full-Stack Developer based in Turin, Italy.

## About

Simone Traversi (born 1999, Turin, Italy) is a robotics software engineer and full-stack developer. Since 2018 he has programmed industrial robots (KUKA, ABB, FANUC, Comau) and trained over 500 students in industrial robotics. He currently works at Makr Shakr SRL as a Software Engineer, developing software for robotic bar systems used in hotels, cruise ships, and events worldwide.

## Current Role

**Software Engineer at Makr Shakr SRL** (Turin, Italy)
- Develops the Flutter mobile app that controls robotic bar systems
- Programs KUKA robotic arms (KRL)
- Engineers 3D-printed custom components for bar hardware

## Skills & Expertise

**Robotics:** KUKA (KRL), ABB (RAPID), FANUC (KAREL), Comau, Pollen Reachy, OPC-UA integration, motion simulation
**Software:** Flutter/Dart, React, Next.js, NestJS, TypeScript, Python, C/C++, ROS, Docker, PostgreSQL
**Hardware:** ESP32, embedded systems, 3D printing (FDM/resin), Fusion 360, CFD studies, plasma cutting

## Notable Projects

- **Speed Skiing Rear Fairings** — Aerodynamic fairings for the Speed Skiing World Cup using 3D scanning, Fusion 360, and CFD.
- **Amazing Hand PWM Controller** — ESP32 robotic hand controller driving 4 fingers via 8 servo motors.
- **AB Ski Lessons Zermatt** — Multilingual booking site and admin dashboard for a ski school (Next.js, Prisma, Stripe, PostgreSQL).
- **ST-Keeb-67** — Handwired mechanical keyboard with plasma-cut inox frame and 3D printed split plate.
- **ProjectaLogs** — Platform for managing 3D printing projects and clients (React, NestJS, Python).
- **Warpato** — Design project exploring furniture shaped by material honesty and craft constraints.
